# Transcrição: 01.3 FINDING PROSPECTS

- **Fonte:** 01.3 FINDING PROSPECTS
- **Duração:** 00:43
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 00:43]

So once you've found this ideal customer or lead or prospect who you want to reach out to, what you're gonna want to do is find the person who has the power to actually hire you on. So whether that's the founder, the owner, the co-founders, the marketing director, whoever it might be, you want to reach out to someone in power who can actually hire you on and you want to make sure that your email is specifically addressed to them. Worst case scenario, you reach out to them and say, hey movement team, hey Cat Howell team, whatever it is, but you want to make sure it's at least somewhat customized. It's much better if you're able to find the exact person who you need to contact, but worst case scenario you can address it to the team.
